title: neuroloma album
intro: Neuroloma album, also known as the "white neuroloma" or "white album plant", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Neuroloma album can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
